run_order: 2. cd backend && python scripts/ingest.py --reset   # if collection empty

agent_notes.qa_pipeline: contextualize → extract_filters → rewrite → retrieve(20) → rerank(5) → build_context → LLM([system]+[history 5 pairs]+[context+question])
agent_notes.detail_pipeline: extract_title → get_anime_details (anilist_id scroll OR vector similarity) → format_detail → LLM
agent_notes.history_window: synthesizer: last 5 turn-pairs (10 msgs). contextualizer: last 4 turn-pairs (8 msgs).
agent_notes.session_id: thread_id UUID4 in LangGraph config. Frontend generates UUID, stores in localStorage. Day 5: chat.vinhkaguya.me (self-hosted Next.js :3000).
agent_notes.streaming: synthesizer_node uses LangChain ChatOpenAI for on_chat_model_stream events. SSE via /chat/stream.

middleware_stack.note: Starlette add_middleware is LIFO. Last added = outermost = first on request.

rag_pipeline_notes.chat_model: gpt-4o-mini (dev) / gpt-4o (prod) — LangChain ChatOpenAI in synthesizer for SSE
rag_pipeline_notes.auto_filter: extract_filters() parses year/genre/format/score from natural language

known_gotchas: AsyncOpenAI: all methods are coroutines, must be awaited
AsyncSqliteSaver.from_conn_string() is an async context manager — use 'async with' in FastAPI lifespan
LangGraph thread_id MUST be passed in every ainvoke() config — without it each call is a fresh conversation
Starlette add_middleware is LIFO — last added = outermost. Security headers must be added AFTER CORS.
grep for HTTP headers is case-sensitive; uvicorn sends lowercase. Use grep -i.
synthesizer_node uses LangChain ChatOpenAI (not raw AsyncOpenAI) so astream_events v2 can capture on_chat_model_stream
cloudflared tunnel create output: "Created tunnel <name> with id <UUID>" — must extract UUID not name for credentials-file path
systemd service WorkingDirectory must be backend/ not project root — uvicorn needs to import app.main
